posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m pleased to announce that you can now import Orders and Items from your Shopify store into monday using Data Importer

I’ve made a specific tutorial for how to set this up too.

shopify1280×720 91 KB

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions on this.

Best wishes,
James
